ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of operation */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial item */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial item */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data pertains to */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter the data pertains to */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the financial item for the given year and quarter */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES financial_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated report */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "executive_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the analysis */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Stock exchange where the company is listed
Unique identifier for each financial item
Unique identifier for each financial data entry
Value of the financial item for the given year and quarter
ID of the analyst who performed the analysis
Last login time of the user
